passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> Name's <funky><color=#226F7FD>Johnny!</color></funky> But the babes.
[[Johnny2]]
passages.name: Johnny

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> ...
[[Johnny3]]
passages.name: Johnny2

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> <color=red><shake> . . .</shake></color>
[[Johnny4]]
passages.name: Johnny3

passages.text:
<color=red>John:</color> They... call me <size=30%><shake>John.</shake></size>
[[You]]
passages.name: Johnny4

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> Presley's the last name. I had it <wave>legally changed!</wave>
[[Johnny6]]
passages.name: Johnny5

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> Human law suggests I can only change my first name. But now . <color=yellow><wave>Yeeeeee-hawwwww!!</wave></color>
[[Johnny7]]
passages.name: Johnny6

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> ...
[[Johnny8]]
passages.name: Johnny7

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> Sorry, that was <size=50%>probably offensive</size>. I'm sure ya missed being around other <color=orange>humans</color>. 
[[Johnny9]]
passages.name: Johnny8

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> I hope I didn't bum you out too badly <shake>bahahaha</shake>!
[[You2]]
passages.name: Johnny9

passages.text:
<color=yellow>You:</color><size=50%> (There is no way...)</size>
[[ZanyCharacter10]]
passages.name: NoWay

passages.text:
<color=yellow>You:</color> I was honestly thinking Elvis.

[[Johnny5]]
passages.name: You

passages.text:
<color=yellow>You:</color> Nah, it's totally chill man. I love seeing anyone learn more about human history.
[[You3]]
passages.name: You2

passages.text: <color=yellow>You:</color> You wanna check out a <sketchy>book</sketchy> right?
passages.name: You3

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>???:</color> Hey boss! Things hangin' all good?
[[ZanyCharacter2]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter

passages.text:
<color=yellow>You:</color> Look, it's a memento. It's important to me.
[[ZanyCharacter11]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter10

passages.text:
<color=yellow>You:</color> I can hide it a bit if it lets you sleep at night better. I can't make that many accomodations though. Sorry! 
[[ZanyCharacter12]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter11

passages.text:
<color=yellow>You:</color> If there's anything else I can help you with I can assist.
[[ZanyCharacter13]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter12

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>???:</color> You're clearly a <wave>human</wave> though right!? I can see through the mask. Ya ain't foolin' anyone!
[[ZanyCharacter14]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter13

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>???:</color> Bahaha! So <wave>sentimental!</wave>
[[ZanyCharacter15]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter14

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>???:</color> I really <wave><color=yellow>dig</color></wave> it though! I don't think I know a single other human! 
[[Johnny]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter15

passages.text:
<color=yellow>You:</color> Y... yea?
[[ZanyCharacter3]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter2

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>???:</color> Can you do me a favor? You know the <wave>coffee machine</wave> right?
[[ZanyCharacter4]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter3

passages.text:
<color=yellow>You:</color> The coffee machine at the back? I swore I got that fixed.
[[ZanyCharacter5]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter4

passages.text:
<color=yellow>You:</color> Is it out of coffee pods or something?
[[ZanyCharacter6]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter5

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>???:</color> No no no! It's just...
[[ZanyCharacter7]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter6

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>???:</color><wave>...</wave>
[[ZanyCharacter8]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter7

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>???:</color> It just makes me <shake><color=red>uncomfortable</color></shake> that's all.
[[ZanyCharacter9]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter8

passages.text:
<color=yellow>You:</color> ...
[[NoWay]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter9
